### Branch Naming Convention Issues

The repository has inconsistent branch naming patterns:

- `agent-{timestamp}` - Agent-generated branches (no description)
- `{agent}/{description}` - Agent-specific branches (good)
- `{type}/{description}` - Traditional branch naming (good)
- `{agent}-{description}-{hash}` - Mixed format (confusing)

**Recommendation**: Standardize on `{agent}/{description}-{date}` format for better organization.
